title: MapCoverageTracker
description: A lightweight Fabric client-side mod for Minecraft 1.21.11 to track mapped locations in your world
body:
![Map Coverage Tracker](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fweigel-dev/MapCoverageTracker/refs/heads/main/src/main/resources/assets/mapcoveragetracker/minecraft_title.png)



Ever started to create a giant map of your world, only to lose track of which 128×128-block “map squares” you’ve already covered?

Map Coverage Tracker helps you keep track of which areas you’ve already mapped.
